writing.positioning: Peyson is a reflective product-minded founder/operator sharing AI-assisted work clarity, personal operating systems, side-project thinking, and practical self-review.
writing.voice: Calm, direct, analytical, friend-like, practical. Avoid teacher-like slogans, cold AI-tool tutorials, generic growth advice, and exaggerated success claims.
contentStandards: Start from a real work or life scene.
Turn confusion into a clear problem statement.
Use AI as a sidekick for sorting facts, records, review, and next actions.
Give one reusable method or decision frame.
End with a concrete comment or reflection opening.
writing.visualSystem: Clean, warm, structured, human, product-minded. Avoid cold tech dashboards, generic AI stock style, and chaotic social-media templates.
